title: clearing_test.gd missing await causes window freeze
Test placement system and remove debug logging
description: Follow-up after firebase activation fix: 1. Test that building placement works consistently (helipad, etc.). 2. Verify influence zone circle appears during placement mode. 3. Remove debug print statements from job_system.gd and placement_controller.gd once confirmed working. Debug logging added to: _check_firebase_zone(), create_build_job(), _handle_left_click(), _commit_single_placement()

title: Firebase visual improvements - radius reduction and placement-only circle
description: 1. Reduced firebase influence radius 20% (210m → 168m) in building_data.gd and firebase.gd. 2. Removed always-visible gold perimeter torus from TOC. 3. Made influence zone circle only visible during placement mode (show/hide methods). 4. Made circle more prominent with thick dashed triangles and bright green color. COMPLETED.

title: Fix TOC construction not activating firebase
description: When TOC is built via JobSystem/PlacementController flow, no Firebase was being created or activated. Added _handle_hq_building_completion() to ConstructionManager that creates and activates Firebase when HQ building spawns. COMPLETED in construction_manager.gd

title: MG Nest needs 360 rotation choice at placement
description: User expects free 360 rotation during initial placement. Current system requires right-click to anchor, then mouse move to aim. Consider: 1) Add UI hint explaining rotation, 2) Allow rotation before anchor, 3) Default facing camera direction

title: Add TOC influence radius visualization during placement
